hero.title: Leading Third-Party Pharma Manufacturer in Baddi for Approved Compositions
hero.subtitle: Saar Biotech provides high-performance contract manufacturing for 2,050+ pharma brands. Specializing in WHO-GMP certified Liquids, Sprays, and Ointments from our excise-free Baddi campus.

categories.title: Specialized Sprays
categories.text: Market leaders in Nasal, Mouth, and Topical spray formulations. Specialized delivery systems for high-efficacy treatments.

categories.title: Syrups & Oral Liquids
categories.text: High-capacity production of Pediatric, Adult, and Wellness syrups with precise formulation stability.

categories.title: Oral Suspensions
categories.text: Stable, taste-masked suspension formats for antibiotics, antacids, and therapeutic supplements.

categories.title: Ointments & Gels
categories.text: Advanced topical formulations for Dermatology, Pain Management, and Wound Care with premium tube packaging.

categories.title: Drops & Solutions
categories.text: Sterile-focused manufacturing for Eye, Ear, and Vitamin drops in compact, easy-to-use delivery formats.

categories.title: Private Label Solutions
categories.text: End-to-end brand-ready manufacturing including artwork coordination, packaging selection, and dispatch logistics.

why.title: WHO-GMP & ISO Certified
why.text: Rigorous adherence to international quality standards, ensuring every batch meets global efficacy benchmarks.

why.title: Excise-Free Baddi Zone
why.text: Strategic location in Himachal Pradesh's excise-free zone, offering significant cost advantages for bulk manufacturing.

why.title: In-house QC & QA Labs
why.text: Dedicated GLP-compliant laboratories for comprehensive testing of raw materials and finished formulations.

why.title: 2,050+ Trusted Partners
why.text: A proven track record of supporting leading pharmaceutical marketing companies across India and export markets.

why.title: Fast Quote Turnaround
why.text: Transparent pricing and feasibility reviews within 24 hours to help you move from concept to production faster.

why.title: Seamless Supply Chain
why.text: Expert coordination of batch documentation, COAs, and logistics for on-time delivery across all states.

process.title: Enquiry & Fitment
process.text: Share your composition needs. We analyze feasibility and provide technical fitment advice immediately.

process.title: Transparent Quoting
process.text: Get competitive pricing based on our Baddi excise benefits, including MOQ and packing details.

process.title: Artwork & Design
process.text: Our team assists in finalizing labels and cartons to ensure regulatory compliance and brand appeal.

process.title: Production & QC
process.text: Manufacturing in WHO-GMP units with real-time in-process checks and rigorous GLP lab testing.

process.title: Quality Release
process.text: Final batch review and certification. Only DCGI-approved, quality-cleared stock is released for dispatch.

process.title: Dispatch & Support
process.text: Timely delivery with complete documentation (COA/Batch Records) to your preferred destination.

faqs.q: What are the benefits of manufacturing in Baddi's Excise-Free Zone?
faqs.a: Manufacturing at Saar Biotech in Baddi offers significant cost savings due to excise tax exemptions, allowing us to provide highly competitive pricing to our third-party partners.

faqs.q: Does Saar Biotech specialize in spray formulations?
faqs.a: Yes, we are one of the few manufacturers specializing in Nasal, Mouth, and Topical sprays, including Vitamin D3 and anti-allergic formulations with specialized delivery systems.

faqs.q: What is the typical MOQ for third-party manufacturing?
faqs.a: Minimum Order Quantities depend on the product category and packing format. We offer flexible MOQs to support both established brands and growing pharma marketing companies.

faqs.q: How does Saar Biotech handle quality control?
faqs.a: We operate in-house GLP-certified laboratories where every batch undergoes rigorous raw material testing, in-process checks, and final finished-product analysis before release.
